site.title: Algerian Center for Economic Foresight, Investment Development and Entrepreneurship
site.description: Shaping Algeria's Economic Future Through Foresight, Investment and Entrepreneurship

hero.title: Shaping Algeria's Economic Future Through Foresight, Investment and Entrepreneurship
hero.subtitle: An independent economic think tank dedicated to supporting sustainable economic development in Algeria

president.name: Akram Zidi
president.title: President of ACEFIDE
president.shortBio: An expert in economics and economic foresight, leading the center's vision towards a sustainable economic future for Algeria.
president.fullBio: Mr. Akram Zidi is the President of the Algerian Center for Economic Foresight, Investment Development and Entrepreneurship (ACEFIDE). He has extensive experience in economics and economic foresight, and through the center, he strives to deliver high-quality economic studies and research that support decision-makers, investors, and entrepreneurs. He believes in the importance of institutional work and strategic partnerships to achieve sustainable economic development in Algeria.

foresight.title: Economic Foresight
foresight.desc: Conducting foresight studies to identify future economic challenges and opportunities

investment.title: Investment Development
investment.desc: Providing practical solutions and recommendations for investors and institutions

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship Support
entrepreneurship.desc: Supporting entrepreneurs and startups through mentorship and training programs

policy.title: Policy Recommendations
policy.desc: Providing policy recommendations to decision-makers and government institutions

about.title: About the Center
about.historyDesc: ACEFIDE officially announced its establishment in summer 2022, during Algeria's Independence Day celebrations. It is a national association contributing to economic development through studies, institutional dialogue, investment promotion, entrepreneurship support, and public awareness.
about.visionDesc: To be a leading center in economic foresight, investment development and entrepreneurship in Algeria and the region, contributing to building a competitive and sustainable knowledge-based economy.
about.missionDesc: Conducting in-depth foresight studies, identifying economic challenges and opportunities, developing practical solutions and recommendations, and communicating them to decision-makers, ministries, institutions, investors and economic stakeholders to contribute to Algeria's sustainable economic development.
about.registrationInfo: National association | Algiers, Algeria | Official launch: summer 2022
